positive: Minimalist stylized illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. Giant, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna create vibrant, contrasting silhouettes against a deep indigo and emerald gradient sky. Central focus on a graceful deer with crystalline antlers drinking from a glowing pool. Clean lines, highly symmetrical composition, thick outlines for optimal screen printing, high contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, deep jewel tones accented by pops of neon glow. Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau style, vector art quality, perfect for apparel.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, messy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, lowres
